description_long: This is a medium-sized reusable grocery bag with a rectangular profile and a warm brown color. The bag features two wide, looped handles made of a slightly lighter material, attached securely to the upper edges for easy carrying. The front and back panels are smooth, with a single metallic snap button at the top center, suggesting a simple closure mechanism. The bag's body appears to be made of a flexible, semi-soft material, likely synthetic fabric or coated canvas, with reinforced edges for durability. The side views reveal a gusseted structure, allowing the bag to expand and accommodate more items. There are no visible logos, branding, or external pockets, giving the bag a clean and minimalist appearance.
description: A brown reusable grocery bag with wide loop handles, a snap button closure, and a clean, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main panel, loop handles, and a central snap button closure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gusseted structure and the thickness of the bag when empty.
description_view_2: Back view, nearly identical to the front, with visible handles and snap button.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the gusset and the bag's depth.
